free_text: A self-supporting target of 232Th foil having a
thicknesses were ~50-60 um, and the E detectors were
~1500 um. T1, covering ~72-88 degree, was mounted on
the same arm as the fission detectors, while T2 and
T3, with a combined ~36 degree coverage, were on a
Four silicon strip detectors each 50 mm X 50 mm,
covered a total angular range of ~94-172 degree on a
fixed arm for fission fragment detection.
No information on the source of uncertainty
